content: An autonomous AI Agent can be designed to dynamically process real-time streaming clinical experience data to guide personalized continuous training and revalidation for integrated case management (ICM) intensivists, automatically adjusting learning plans based on emergent on-the-job experience streams rather than static pre-planned curricula. This creates a closed-loop continuous improvement system that ties hands-on practice directly to individual professional development.
source_topics: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
trigger_topic: Streaming experience processing for ICM training
